data.title: BlackRock's IBIT Bitcoin ETF experiences record $2.7B outflow over five weeks, amid deeper BTC correction. Key for institutional exposure.
data.description: BlackRock Inc. is experiencing consistent outflows from its iShares Bitcoin Trust, with investors withdrawing over $2.7 billion in the last five weeks. This marks the longest stretch of withdrawals for IBIT since its launch in January 2024. According to Bloomberg, data reveals that more than $2.7 billion exited the fund in the five weeks leading up to Nov. 28, with an additional $113 million withdrawn on Thursday. These withdrawals come on the heels of Bitcoin's substantial correction in October, resulting in over $1 trillion in cryptocurrency market value being wiped out. The ETF, which boasts more than $71 billion in assets, has historically been an important tool for institutional exposure to Bitcoin, making the recent shift in flows particularly significant.

data.title: Praxis Precision Medicines rises 30% to a 3-year high after halting epilepsy study early for strong results.
data.description: Shares of Praxis Precision Medicines soared on Friday after the company decided to end an epilepsy study ahead of schedule due to significant effectiveness. The stock surged 30%, reaching a new three-year high, following this unexpected success in the epilepsy treatment.

data.title: SoFi stock drops after announcing $1.5 billion public offering of common stock.
data.description: The stock of SoFi experienced a decline on Friday following the fintech company's announcement of a public offering of $1.5 billion in common stock. The news of the offering resulted in a drop in SoFi's stock value.

data.title: EU plans to unify crypto rules; IMF flags stablecoin danger. IMF, S. Africa bank anxious about stablecoins, US allows spot crypto trading on futures markets.
data.description: The International Monetary Fund (IMF) and the central bank of South Africa have expressed ongoing worries regarding stablecoins. Meanwhile, in the United States, it is reported that spot cryptocurrency products, valued at approximately $2.1 trillion, are now eligible for trading on futures markets.

data.title: Sunday Swagger partners with Dole for a vibrant collaboration, merging golf apparel with tropical vibes.
data.description: A partnership has been revealed between Sunday Swagger, a performance golf and lifestyle apparel brand, and Dole Food Company, a major producer of fresh fruits and vegetables. The collaboration showcases vibrant colors inspired by Dole's tropical fruits. Sunday Swagger is recognized for its comfortable and stylish designs in the golf industry. Dole Food Company, renowned for its high-quality produce, is among the world's top suppliers in the market. This fusion of brands brings a blend of bright shades and lively patterns to the apparel line. Sunday Swagger's commitment to both comfort and individuality remains intact with this association. The partnership aims to introduce a unique collection that resonates with the essence of Dole's tropical fruit range.

data.title: Bed Bath & Beyond appoints Glen Cary as Chief of Stores, bringing 25 years of experience.
data.description: In Murray, Utah, Bed Bath & Beyond, Inc. (NYSE: BBBY) and The Brand House Collective, Inc. (Nasdaq: TBHC) have revealed the appointment of Glen Cary as the Chief of Stores for Bed Bath & Beyond and its affiliated brands. Glen has over 25 years of experience in senior retail leadership, with a substantial tenure at Bed Bath & Beyond. During his time there, he held positions as the Chief of Stores and the President of buybuy BABY. With his extensive background in the industry, Glen Cary's appointment marks a significant move for the company.

data.title: India has 132 existing data centers, 84 upcoming ones. Maharashtra has 45% of upcoming data center power capacity. Mumbai is the largest hub.
data.description: A database titled "India Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. India currently houses about 132 data centers, with key locations in Maharashtra and Tamil Nadu. Maharashtra holds the majority share of upcoming data center power capacity, representing around 45% of India's total. Mumbai stands out as the leading data center hub in the nation. Notably, in 2025, several significant data center facilities were launched.

data.title: Atropos Health improves oncology precision medicine with new AI algorithms for PNH, integrating ASCO guidelines. #PrecisionMedicine #AI
data.description: Atropos Health, based in Palo Alto, California, has unveiled new AI tools for monitoring patients with paroxysmal nocturnal hemoglobinuria (PNH), a rare blood disorder. These tools aim to provide personalized real-world evidence and insights by analyzing real-world clinical data. The company had previously announced an algorithm to enhance early diagnosis for PNH. This recent development introduces progression monitoring tools to further aid in managing the condition. Atropos Health continues to innovate in the realm of medical technology to improve patient care.

data.title: EUDA Health Holdings sold a convertible warrant for US$100,000 to Streeterville Capital for 2,000,000 shares at US$6/sh.
data.description: Singapore, December 5, 2025 - EUDA Health Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: EUDA), a Singapore-based healthcare provider in Asia with a focus on Singapore, Malaysia, and China, recently announced the signing of a securities purchase agreement on November 26, 2025. The agreement was made with Streeterville Capital, LLC for the purchase of a convertible warrant valued at US$100,000. This warrant allows for the purchase of up to 2,000,000 newly issued EUDA ordinary shares at US$6.00 per share. The offering is in line with the company’s effective shelf registration statement on Form F-3 (File No. 333-282723) and a related prospectus supplement.

data.title: SemiCab teams up with Provisi.ai to boost US SaaS revenue. #partnership #growth
data.description: In recent reports, it has been disclosed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, marking a 0.3% decrease from the previous quarter. This decrease has resulted in a significant increase in the number of new jobs created, with approximately 250,000 jobs being added to the economy. Additionally, the stock market has seen a growth of 2.5% in the last month, setting a new record high. Experts are optimistic about the economic outlook, citing these positive indicators as signs of a strong and stable economy moving forward.

data.title: Sustainable Green Team files 24th U.S. patent for Mobile Waste Diversion Oracle™, addressing landfill avoidance and carbon credits.
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, on December 5, 2025, Sustainable Green Team, Ltd. (OTC: SGTM), known for their regenerative waste-to-resource technologies, revealed the submission of their 24th U.S. provisional patent application to the United States Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO). This patent application is for the Mobile Waste Diversion Oracle™, a pioneering solution that tackles a crucial issue in the carbon-credit ecosystem. The innovation allows for the verification of organic waste diversion from landfills - a significant initial step in averting methane emissions, yet one that has not been financially incentivized before.

data.title: Alley Cat Allies offers $10,000 reward for info leading to prosecution in case of cat shot with blowgun dart in San Antonio.
data.description: In San Antonio on December 5, 2025, Alley Cat Allies, a prominent advocate for feline welfare, announced a reward of $10,000 for details that result in the arrest and conviction related to a cat being targeted with a blowgun dart. The incident occurred on November 29.
